scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c red,blue "npm run dev -w @devcolab/api" "npm run dev -w @devcolab/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @devcolab/api && npm run build -w @devcolab/web && npm run build -w @devcolab/storybook
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @devcolab/api && npm run lint -w @devcolab/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @devcolab/api && npm run typecheck -w @devcolab/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @devcolab/api && npm run test -w @devcolab/web
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w @devcolab/api && npm run test:coverage -w @devcolab/web
